title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero of Cursor argues that most companies plateau at 40% productivity gain with AI coding assistants because the bottleneck lies in the broader SDLC, not code generation alone. Cursor is deploying autonomous agents across bug triage, security review, risk detection, and growth experimentation to push past this plateau.
